_comment: Scrape targets per building. Keyed by slug; values map to the Building.apartments_com_url and Building.google_place_id columns.
1. apartments.com listing URL: search '<building name> <address>' on apartments.com, open the listing, copy the URL. Example shape: https://www.apartments.com/<building>-<city>-<state>/<id>/

2. google_place_id: open the building on Google Maps, click 'Share', use the short URL or look up the place_id via https://developers.google.com/maps/documentation/places/web-service/place-id. Example shape: ChIJ...
Buildings with NULL values are skipped by the scrapers (the app falls back to the seed values from the static dashboard). Safe to re-run the seed loader after updating this file.
All entries below are placeholders. Replace each null with the real URL or place_id, then run: python -m app.seed.loader
